signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below 2.4% Forecast | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but undershot market expectations of 2.4%, with core inflation easing to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][2] Monthly CPI rose 0.3%, weaker than the 0.6% forecast, amid oil price surges from the Iran conflict, though fuel caps were intro
